response.justification: The role requires 8 years of C++ programming as a hard minimum, plus 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute, storage, or hardware focus. The candidate's background is primarily in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and full-stack web/mobile work, with only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015). There is no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership, C++ at scale, or formal technical-leadership experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Long, varied engineering career across web, mobile, embedded, and data-integration systems
Strong testing/TDD culture and demonstrated mentoring via workshops, talks, and courses
Some low-latency, high-throughput experience (Sociomantic micro-services handling millions of requests/sec in DLang)
concerns: Falls drastically short of the 8-year C++ requirement — only a single short C/C++ role visible
No demonstrated large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed-systems infrastructure ownership
No formal tech-lead role managing cloud/DevOps engineers or driving platform technical strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed infra leadership
